declarations.description: Collapsible content panel. Each accordion item manages its own open/closed state.
declarations.name: KbAccordion

slots.description: Clickable header that toggles the panel.
slots.name: trigger

events.name: kb-toggle
events.description: Dispatched when open state changes, with `detail.open`.

declarations.description: Content card container with brutalist styling.
declarations.name: KbCard

declarations.description: Styled list container for ordered or unordered content.
declarations.name: KbList

declarations.description:
Data table wrapper with brutalist styling.
Wraps a native `<table>` and applies Tailwind classes to it and its descendants.
declarations.name: KbTable

declarations.description: Interactive tag element with optional close action.
declarations.name: KbTag

events.name: kb-close
events.description: Dispatched when the close button is clicked.

declarations.description: Primary interactive button with brutalist styling.
declarations.name: KbButton

declarations.description: Checkbox control with brutalist styling.
declarations.name: KbCheckbox

declarations.description: Form field wrapper that provides context (required, invalid, disabled) to child inputs.
declarations.name: KbFormControl

declarations.description: Label for form controls. Displays a required indicator when `required` is set.
declarations.name: KbFormLabel

declarations.description: Icon-only button for toolbar actions and compact controls.
declarations.name: KbIconButton

declarations.description: Text input field with brutalist styling.
declarations.name: KbInput

declarations.description: Radio button control with brutalist styling.
declarations.name: KbRadio

declarations.description: Dropdown select with brutalist styling and custom arrow.
declarations.name: KbSelect

declarations.description: Toggle switch control with brutalist styling.
declarations.name: KbSwitch

declarations.description: Multi-line text input with brutalist styling.
declarations.name: KbTextarea

declarations.description: Breadcrumb navigation trail showing page hierarchy.
declarations.name: KbBreadcrumb

declarations.description: Styled anchor link with brutalist variants.
declarations.name: KbLink

declarations.description: Tab navigation container. Manages active tab state and emits change events.
declarations.name: KbTabs

events.name: kb-tab-change
events.description: Dispatched when active tab changes, with `detail.index`.

declarations.description: Slide-out panel overlay from any edge of the viewport.
declarations.name: KbDrawer

declarations.description: Modal dialog overlay with backdrop and keyboard dismissal.
declarations.name: KbModal

declarations.description: Interactive content popover anchored to a trigger element.
declarations.name: KbPopover

declarations.description: Text tooltip shown on hover over a trigger element.
declarations.name: KbTooltip

slots.description: Trigger element that activates the tooltip on hover.

declarations.description: Status alert banner for displaying feedback messages.
declarations.name: KbAlert

declarations.description: Compact label for status indicators, counts, or category tags.
declarations.name: KbBadge

declarations.description: Determinate or indeterminate progress bar with brutalist styling.
declarations.name: KbProgress

declarations.description: Animated loading spinner indicator.
declarations.name: KbSpinner

declarations.description: Notification toast popup with auto-dismiss and status styling.
declarations.name: KbToast

events.name: kb-close
events.description: Dispatched when the toast is dismissed.

declarations.description: Monospace code display element. Inline by default, block when `block` is set.
declarations.name: KbCode

declarations.description: Heading element (h1-h6) with brutalist uppercase styling.
declarations.name: KbHeading

declarations.description: Body text element with brutalist typography defaults.
declarations.name: KbText

declarations.description: Fundamental layout primitive. Renders a `<div>` with style prop support.
declarations.name: KbBox

declarations.description: Centered content container with a configurable max-width.
declarations.name: KbContainer

declarations.description: Visual separator between content sections.
declarations.name: KbDivider

declarations.description: Flexbox layout container. Shorthand for `<kb-box display="flex">`.
declarations.name: KbFlex

declarations.description: CSS Grid layout container.
declarations.name: KbGrid

declarations.description: Linear stack layout. Arranges children vertically or horizontally with consistent spacing.
declarations.name: KbStack
